title: Securities Laws: In a cash tender offer, the bidder usually must wait...
summary: Assess whether a cash tender offer requires SEC approval before submitting materials to shareholders.
prompt: In a cash tender offer, the bidder usually must wait for SEC approval before submitting the tender offer materials.
solution: In a cash tender offer, the bidder submits tender offer materials directly to shareholders, following the requirements of the Williams Act without waiting for SEC approval.
